messages.text: Hi Rebecca, what aspects of the golf cart do you value the most? 1. Range 2. Custom configuration 3. Delivery time/:raisehand.
I sent you a quote last time but you didn't respond. Was it because the price didn't meet your budget, or were you considering the golf cart's range or quality issues?/:raisehand.
Looking forward to your reply, my friend

Hey Tayton, here is the quote for the E model 4-seater golf cart, and the included configurations are as follows: 
 1. Motor 4KW 
 2. 48V 150Ah lithium battery 
 3. 12inch Tires 
 4. Other configurations: luxury seats, dashboard, and screen 
 Regarding the warranty: 
 (1) Lithium battery warranty period is 6 years 
 (2) Golf cart accessories (motor, controller, rear axle) have a 2-year warranty. 
 Free gift items: 
 (1) Free custom logo for the seat and front bumper 
 (2) Free photography and video recording of a set of golf carts
Hey Tayton, I have already sent you the quote. Have you been very busy lately? Because it shows that you haven't been online for the past two days. Remember to check when you come online/:raisehand.

We offer four Incoterms for delivery:
1. EXW (Ex Works): Delivery at factory
2. FOB (Free On Board): Delivery at domestic port
3. CIF (Cost, Insurance, and Freight): Delivery at US port
4. DDP (Delivered Duty Paid): Delivery to destination
Our golf carts are exclusively electric, though models D and E are also available with gas engines.
